case_title: REGNALDO WOODS VS. CHRIS JONES et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-07-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT LUIS GARRETT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
